cedict_en: old variant of 笑[xiao4]/to laugh; to smile/to laugh at

must_distinguish.note: 笑 = laugh or smile broadly (covers both laughter and smiling); 微笑 = smile gently (no laughing, often warm/polite).

cedict_en: to take down (in writing)/notes/a type of literature consisting mainly of short sketches/CL:本[ben3]
dataset_meanings: a type of literature consisting mainly of short sketches

must_distinguish.note: 笔记 = notes (the written content of what one records); 本子 = notebook (the physical object); learners confuse them when translating 'take notes in a notebook'

cedict_en: to sign one's name/to write brief comments on a document/inscribed bamboo stick (variant of 籤|签[qian1])/visa/inscribed bamboo stick (used in divination, gambling, drawing lots etc)/small wood sliver/label/tag
dataset_meanings: to write brief comments on a document
inscribed bamboo stick (used in divination, gambling, drawing lots etc)

must_distinguish.note: 签 = sign (a document, general); 签约 = sign a contract (verb-object, commercial/legal); 签证 = visa (noun, admin document bearing official signature/stamp)

cedict_en: to sign (one's name with a pen etc)/to autograph/signature
dataset_meanings: to sign (one's name with a pen etc)

must_distinguish.note: 签名 = personal autograph or casual signing; 签字 = official signature on a document; 签署 = formally sign (agreement/declaration); 签订 = conclude AND sign (a contract/treaty).

cedict_en: to sign a contract or agreement
dataset_meanings: to sign a contract or agreement

must_distinguish.note: 签 = sign (a document, general); 签约 = sign a contract (verb-object, commercial/legal); 签证 = visa (noun, admin document bearing official signature/stamp)
盒子 = small box or case (cosmetics, gift); 箱子 = large box or suitcase (general); 行李箱 = specifically a travel suitcase or luggage trunk.
稻谷 (5k) = unhusked paddy rice (field/raw grain); 米 (5k) = husked uncooked rice (also 'meter'); 米饭 = cooked/steamed rice served as food

cedict_en: (of sth long) wide; thick/(of sth granular) coarse/(of a voice) gruff/(of sb's manner etc) rough; crude; careless; rude/variant of 粗[cu1]/remote; distant

must_distinguish.note: 粗 = thick/coarse in diameter (also 'rough' in texture or manner); 细 = thin/fine in diameter or detail (also 'meticulous'); 薄 = thin in flat thickness (paper, slices, walls) — not about diameter.

首 = head/chief (literary, also classifier for songs/poems); 组长 = small team/group leader; 所长 = head of an institute or bureau; 领导 = everyday boss/leader (also verb: to lead); 领导人 = official leader (formal title); 领袖 = top political figure/chief (elevated, reverential)

cedict_en: thin or slender/finely particulate/thin and soft/fine/delicate/trifling/(of a sound) quiet/frugal

must_distinguish.note: 粗 = thick/coarse in diameter (also 'rough' in texture or manner); 细 = thin/fine in diameter or detail (also 'meticulous'); 薄 = thin in flat thickness (paper, slices, walls) — not about diameter.

cedict_en: (of a plant) to produce (fruit or seeds)/Taiwan pr. [jie2]/knot/sturdy/bond/to tie/to bind/to check out (of a hotel)
dataset_meanings: (of a plant) to produce (fruit or seeds)

must_distinguish.note: 结 = tie a knot (general, also: knot as noun); 捆绑 = bind/tie up tightly (restraining a person or bundle); 系领带 = tie a necktie (specific clothing action)
绿 = green (basic color adjective); 绿色 = green (color noun; also metaphor for eco-friendly); 青 = blue-green (traditional color term, also means young/unripe)

cedict_en: to weave/to plait/to organize/to group/to arrange/to edit/to compile/to write/to compose/to fabricate/to make up

must_distinguish.note: 编 = weave/compile/make up (broad: stories, baskets, numbers). 编织 = weave/knit (physical interlacing of threads/strands). 编辑 = edit/revise (text, media); also 'editor' (person).
缺 = to lack (verb) or shortage (noun), specific deficit; 贫乏 = scarce/impoverished (adjective), general insufficiency of resources or content.
美好 = beautiful/wonderful applied to abstract things (life, future, memories); 美丽 = physically beautiful (appearance); 美 = root adjective (beautiful) or abbreviation for America
美金 = US dollar (informal/spoken, mainland China); 美元 = US dollar (neutral formal term used in writing and official contexts)
美食 = fine food/cuisine (everyday word, also used as a category: 美食文化); 佳肴 = delicious dishes (literary/formal, used in toasts or written descriptions).
群体 = sociological group/community (formal, written); 伙 = colloquial bunch/gang or partner (informal); 团 = a lump/group (also classifier for lumps/troops)

cedict_en: see 老頭子|老头子[lao3 tou2 zi5]

must_distinguish.note: 老人 = old person (neutral, general); 老头儿 = old man (colloquial, slightly familiar); 老年 = old age (the life stage/period, not a person label); 年纪 = age in years (often of elderly, colloquial)

cedict_en: native place/place of origin/home state or region

must_distinguish.note: 老家 is colloquial 'native hometown' (where family roots are); 家乡 is the everyday spoken word for hometown; 故乡 is literary/formal for native place
老人 = old person (neutral, general); 老头儿 = old man (colloquial, slightly familiar); 老年 = old age (the life stage/period, not a person label); 年纪 = age in years (often of elderly, colloquial)
老是 = colloquial 'always keeps doing' (complaint tone); 总 = general 'always/overall'; 向来 = habitual 'has always been (this way)'; 历来 = historical precedent 'has always been (by tradition)'
职工 = workers/staff of an institution, factory, or state enterprise (collective, official); 员工 (5k) = employees of a company (corporate/modern usage)
工人 = blue-collar manual worker; 员工 = collective term for company staff (white- and blue-collar); 职工 = workers and staff of an institution/factory (official/formal, implies employment relationship).

cedict_en: to assemble; to gather (transitive or intransitive)/(chemistry) poly-

must_distinguish.note: 聚 = gather/assemble (people or things, naturally); 集合 = assemble (organised, commanded); 采集 = collect/harvest (specimens, data, natural resources); 收集 = gather/collect (items systematically); 收藏 = collect/keep (for pleasure or preservation — hobby)

cedict_en: fat/fertile/loose-fitting or large/to fertilize/to become rich by illegal means/fertilizer/manure
dataset_meanings: to become rich by illegal means

must_distinguish.note: 胖 = fat/plump (of people); 肥 = fat (of animals, or clothes that are loose/baggy); using 肥 for a person is blunt/pejorative.

cedict_en: behind/at the back/in the rear/behind sb's back

must_distinguish.note: 后面 = neutral spatial 'behind'; 背后 = behind s.o.'s back (literal or figurative scheming); 后头 = colloquial synonym of 后面; 后 = particle/literary 'after; behind'

cedict_en: victory/success/to beat/to defeat/to surpass/victorious/superior to/to get the better of/better than/surpassing/superb (of vista)/beautiful (scenery)/wonderful (view)/(Taiwan pr. [sheng1]) able to bear/equal to (a task)

must_distinguish.note: 中奖 = win a lottery/prize draw (chance); 获奖 = receive a formal award/prize (achievement); 赢得 = win/gain something through effort (takes an object: trust, title); 赢 = simply win a contest/game; 胜 = beat an opponent (verb, also adj 'superior'); 胜利 = victory (noun, often military/political)

cedict_en: beard/mustache or whiskers/facial hair/CL:撮[zuo3],根[gen1]/(coll.) bandit

must_distinguish.note: 胡子 = beard/mustache (everyday colloquial); 胡须 = beard/whiskers (more formal or written register)
胸 = chest (bare root, used in compounds); 胸部 = chest area (clinical/anatomical, with 部 suffix); 胸膛 = chest/bosom (physical cavity, more literary/vivid)
大脑 = anatomical brain (cerebrum, medical/scientific); 头脑 = intellect/judgement (figurative, somewhat formal: 头脑清醒); 脑子 = brains/mind in everyday colloquial speech (用脑子想想).
脚步 = footstep (concrete, audible — the sound or act of steps); 步伐 = pace/gait (manner and rhythm of walking, more abstract/formal).

脸色 = facial color/complexion or mood-signaling look; 气色 (5k) = overall complexion/vitality; 神色 (5k) = expression/air (more literary); 神情 (5k) = mental/emotional look; 表情 (5k) = facial expression (deliberate/mimicked)

meaning_en: to be willing to part with
cedict_en: to be willing to part with sth
dataset_meanings: to be willing to part with sth

must_distinguish.note: 舞 = dance (verb) / wield/brandish (verb); colloquial. 舞蹈 = dance (noun, art form / choreography); more formal.

cedict_en: color/CL:種|种[zhong3]/look/appearance/sex/(coll.) color/used in 色子[shai3 zi5]

must_distinguish.note: 颜色 = color (neutral everyday noun); 色 = color (root morpheme, used in compounds, also literary); 色彩 = color with tonal/figurative nuance (also: flavor, hue in art/rhetoric)
色 is a morpheme/literary noun; 颜色 is the everyday neutral noun for 'color'; 彩色 means 'multicolored/color' as an attribute (彩色电视); 色彩 (5k) is literary/figurative 'hue/flavor'
药物 = a drug or medication (the substance); 医学 = medicine as a scientific field of study — both translate to 'medicine' in English

cedict_en: to gain; to get; to acquire
dataset_meanings: to gain; to get; to acquire

must_distinguish.note: 获取 = actively fetch/acquire (information, data, resources — process-focused); 获得 = obtain a result or achievement (outcome-focused, slightly more formal)
中奖 = win by chance (lottery, lucky draw); 获奖 = receive a merit-based award/prize; 赢 = win (competition, game — broadest)

中奖 = win a lottery/prize draw (chance); 获奖 = receive a formal award/prize (achievement); 赢得 = win/gain something through effort (takes an object: trust, title); 赢 = simply win a contest/game; 胜 = beat an opponent (verb, also adj 'superior'); 胜利 = victory (noun, often military/political)
蓝色 = blue as color noun; 蓝 = standard blue adjective; 青 = blue-green/cyan (traditional color term, also means 'young')
Both translate as 'insect'. 昆虫 is the scientific/formal term (true insects only); 虫子 is colloquial and broader — covers bugs, worms, caterpillars, and any crawling creature.

cedict_en: to travel along a route (of vehicles etc)
dataset_meanings: to travel along a route (of vehicles etc)

cedict_en: to repair/to patch/to mend/to make up for/to fill (a vacancy)/to supplement

must_distinguish.note: 补 = patch/mend or make up for (also figurative:补缺); 修 = repair (colloquial, general); 修理 = fix a specific broken object (hands-on); 修复 = restore damaged or destroyed items (includes digital/ecological).
衬衣 = shirt (colloquial, generic); 衬衫 = shirt/blouse (slightly more formal, can refer to both men's shirts and women's blouses).

cedict_en: to decorate/interior decoration/to fit up/to renovate

must_distinguish.note: 装修 = renovate/fit out a building (construction work); 装饰 = decorate with ornaments (aesthetic embellishment, no structural work)
西部 = the western part/region (geographic section of a country or area); 西方 = the West (civilizational/cultural concept; also used in religion)
观看 = watch/view (entertainment, a performance, screen); 观察 = observe/study (with attention, scientific or investigative)

cedict_en: to view as/to see as/to consider to be/to deem

must_distinguish.note: 看成/视为 = regard X as Y (equating two things); 视为 is more formal/written; 看待 = treat/view (attitude toward something); 认为 = hold an opinion, think that
言语 = speech/words as a compound noun (everyday or formal); 言 (5k) = literary bound morpheme for words/speech; 语 (5k) = literary bound morpheme for language/utterance
认出 = recognize a known person/thing on sight; 认 = recognize or admit (broad base verb); 识别 = identify by category/system; 辨认 = identify by careful scrutiny; 承认 = admit/acknowledge (a fact, guilt)
认出 = recognize a known person/thing on sight; 认 = recognize or admit (broad base verb); 识别 = identify by category/system; 辨认 = identify by careful scrutiny; 承认 = admit/acknowledge (a fact, guilt)

cedict_en: to remember/to bear in mind/to learn by heart

must_distinguish.note: 记住 = commit to memory (active memorizing); 想起 = recall something previously forgotten; 想到 = think of/realize (may be spontaneous); 记忆 = memory as faculty or stored recollection (noun/verb)

cedict_en: a speech/to speak/to talk/to address/CL:個|个[ge4]

must_distinguish.note: 讲 = speak/explain (general, any register); 讲话 = speak or give a speech (semi-formal, implies a speech act); 发言 = make a public statement or address (formal/institutional)

cedict_en: to admonish/variant of 證|证[zheng4]/certificate/proof/to prove/to demonstrate/to confirm/variant of 症[zheng4]

must_distinguish.note: 证 = an ID document or pass (身份证); also a bound morpheme 'to certify'; 证明 = to prove something / a letter of proof (less formal document); 证书 = a formal certificate, diploma, or credentials.
诗 = poem or poetry (single work or the art); 诗歌 = poetry as a genre/collective term (slightly more formal)
诚信 is an internal quality — honesty and integrity as character; 名誉 is one's external reputation / good name as perceived by others

cedict_en: speech sounds/pronunciation/colloquial (rather than literary) pronunciation of a Chinese character/phonetic/audio/voice/(Internet) to voice chat/voice message
dataset_meanings: colloquial (rather than literary) pronunciation of a Chinese character

must_distinguish.note: 读音 = pronunciation of a specific character/word (how to read it); 语音 = speech sounds broadly, or voice (tech: voice message); 口音 = regional accent/speech flavor

cedict_en: to read a book/to study/to attend school

must_distinguish.note: 读书 = read/study broadly (colloquial, often = attend school); 阅读 = read silently (formal, written texts); 朗读 = read aloud expressively; 念 = recite or read aloud (casual)

cedict_en: pronunciation/literary (rather than colloquial) pronunciation of a Chinese character
dataset_meanings: literary (rather than colloquial) pronunciation of a Chinese character

must_distinguish.note: 读音 = pronunciation of a specific character/word (how to read it); 语音 = speech sounds broadly, or voice (tech: voice message); 口音 = regional accent/speech flavor
班级 = class as an administrative unit (the homeroom group); 课堂 = classroom/class as the instructional space or session
